Document:
# Welcome to OpenEdge 14
OpenEdge 14 is a medieval fantasy multiplayer RPG. You share a living world with other players — cooperate, trade, fight, and forge your own path.
## Where to Start
[bold]Pick your species.[/bold] Each race has different strengths, weaknesses, and racial abilities. See [textlink="Race Comparison" link="OE14RaceComparison"] for detailed stat breakdowns, or [textlink="Playable Species" link="OE14_EN_Species"] for lore.
[bold]Pick your job.[/bold] Your job determines your starting equipment and salary. Each job opens different doors for how you play the round.
[bold]Spend your stat points.[/bold] At character creation you receive 3 points to distribute across Strength, Vitality, Dexterity, and Intelligence. Choose based on your playstyle.
## Core Controls
- [bold]C[/bold] — Character menu (stats, modifier breakdown) - [bold]I[/bold] — Inventory - [bold]Q[/bold] — Action bar (spells appear here when you equip a magical item) - [bold]Right-click[/bold] — Context menu (examine, pick up, interact, attack)
## Staying Alive
Your [color=#e05050]health bar[/color] appears at the bottom of the screen. When it reaches zero you enter a critical state — you need help fast.
- Carry [bold]bandages[/bold] to stop bleeding - Eat and drink to maintain stamina - If outmatched, [bold]run[/bold] — retreating is not a failure
## The Four Stats
[color=#e05050]Strength[/color] — physical damage. STR 5 is neutral (1.0x). Higher means harder hits.
[color=#50e050]Vitality[/color] — maximum health. VIT 5 = 100 HP to critical. Each point adds or subtracts 12.5 HP.
[color=#50e0e0]Dexterity[/color] — stamina (knockdown resistance). DEX 5 = 100 stamina. Running out drops you to the ground.
[color=#a050e0]Intelligence[/color] — mana pool. INT 5 = 100 mana. Without mana, spells cannot be cast.
## Tips
- [bold]Examine everything[/bold] — right-click items to read what they do - [bold]Coins are physical[/bold] — keep them in a pouch so you don't drop them when hit - [bold]Death is not the end[/bold] — you respawn. Use the time to think about what to do differently
